creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Accidentally referenced bug 156773 on commit instead of this one. Full commit message (in all its PEBCAK glory) is below:

A commit references this bug:

Author: koobs
Date: Fri Jun  5 03:54:03 UTC 2015
New revision: 388565
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/388565

Log:
  devel/py-asyncio: Update to 3.4.3

  - Update to 3.4.3
  - Add LICENSE_FILE
  - Sort USE_PYTHON
  - Update regression-test to canonical test command usage
  - Update WWW: (Google Code -> Github)

  Changes:

    https://github.com/python/asyncio/blob/master/ChangeLog

  Based on:

  PR:		156773
  Submitted by:	Vitaly Magerya <vmagerya gmail com>

Changes:
  head/devel/py-asyncio/Makefile
  head/devel/py-asyncio/distinfo
  head/devel/py-asyncio/pkg-descr
